Container.Name: HermitStash
Container.Overview: Post-quantum encrypted, self-hosted file upload server. [br][br] ML-KEM-1024 + P-384 hybrid encryption, XChaCha20-Poly1305, zero plaintext on disk. All database fields vault-sealed, TLS gated on post-quantum key exchange. Zero npm dependencies. Admin panel for all configuration. [br][br] After starting, visit http://[IP]:[PORT:3000] to complete the setup wizard.
Container.Requires: Requires at least 256MB shared memory (--shm-size=256m) for the in-memory encrypted database.

Config.Name: Data
Config.Description: Encrypted database, vault keys, TLS certs. BACK THIS UP.

Config.Name: Uploads
Config.Description: Uploaded files (local storage only, not needed with S3)

Config.Name: PUID
Config.Description: User ID for file permissions (Unraid default 99 = nobody).

Config.Name: PGID
Config.Description: Group ID for file permissions (Unraid default 100 = users).

Config.Name: UMASK
Config.Description: File permission mask. 022 = 755 dirs / 644 files. Use 000 to match Unraid's nobody:users sharing model.

Config.Name: Site Origin
Config.Description: Full URL of your site (e.g. https://files.example.com). Required for passkeys and HSTS.

Config.Name: Trust Proxy
Config.Description: Set to true if behind a reverse proxy (nginx, Cloudflare, SWAG)

Config.Name: Storage Backend
Config.Description: local for disk or s3 for S3-compatible storage
